channel.title: Reverb — New Bass Guitars
channel.description: Recently listed bass guitars on Reverb

item.title: Wandré Cobra Basso — $3,343.05
item.description:
$3,343.05 · Good · Chipo's Shop

Ma guitare basse davoli wandré cobra basso fabriqué dans les année 60 est en parfait état de fonctionnement avec tout son électronique d'origine (sauf un bouton de potentiomètre manquant), ainsi que les mécaniques et le chevalet. J'ai cependant des doutes sur l'origine du pickguard... Le repose doigt à été refait par mes soins. Elle a hélas subit quelques aléas dû a ses 60ans : le vernis commençait a se décoller a l'arrière, l'évolution a été stoppée à la cyanoacrylate, en plus de 10ans ça n'a plus jamais évolué.

item.title: Kawai FII-B Bass mit aktiver Electronik — $1,313.34
item.description:
$1,313.34 · Good · doc-Bs privat shop

Kawai FII-B Bass zu verkaufen. Guter Allgemeinzustand, nur ein paar kleine Macken hier und da, siehe Fotos. Der Bass ist seit Anfang der 90er Jahre in meinem Besitz, wurde aber in den letzten Jahren kaum noch gespielt. Die Saitenlage lässt sich sehr gut spielen, die aktive Elektronik bietet eine Vielzahl an Soundmöglichkeiten. Neben einem Drehschalter (Bridge, beide, Neck) gibt es für jeden PU einen 3 Positionen Schalter mit dem Einfluss auf den Sound genommen werden kann. Das YT Video zeigt die Möglichkeiten recht gut. Der Bass kommt in einem Formkoffer, wie im Foto zu sehen.

Kawai FII-B bass for sale. In good overall condition, just a few minor imperfections here and there – see photos. I’ve owned this bass since the early 90s, but it’s hardly been played in recent years. The action is very comfortable to play, and the active electronics offer a wide range of sound options. As well as a rotary switch (bridge, both, neck), there is a 3-position switch for each pickup, allowing you to adjust the sound. The YouTube video demonstrates the possibilities quite well. The bass comes in a moulded case, as shown in the photo.

item.title: Fender Standard Precision Bass with Rosewood Fretboard — $1,014.85
item.description:
$1,014.85 · Mint · Berta’s Bass Boutique

A classic workhorse with vintage-inspired tone and modern reliability — this Fender Standard Precision Bass in Candy Apple Red delivers the iconic P-Bass growl, punchy mids, and warm lows that players have loved for decades.

Equipped with a smooth rosewood fretboard and classic single-coil P-Bass pickup, this model offers the unmistakable feel and tone that made the Precision Bass a cornerstone of modern music. Built between 2009–2016, it combines proven Fender quality with a finish that really stands out on stage.

Highlights:

  • Candy Apple Red finish – eye-catching and classic
  • Rosewood fretboard – smooth, warm feel
  • Classic P-Bass tone – punchy, articulate, versatile
  • Excellent condition, ready for gigging or recording

A reliable, professional bass that’s perfect for players who want classic Fender tone with modern build quality.

item.title: VIGIER Excess Indus — $3,104.26
item.description:
$3,104.26 · Mint · Berta’s Bass Boutique

The Vigier Excess Indus is a modern boutique bass built for serious players who demand precision, sustain, and clarity. Handcrafted in France, it features Vigier’s signature 90/10 carbon-reinforced neck, exceptional electronics, and a sleek, ergonomic body designed for comfort and balance.

With its versatile active electronics, the Excess Indus delivers tight lows, clear mids, and singing highs, making it perfect for studio, live performance, or any style where tone matters. Every detail — from the hardware to the finish — is designed for professional reliability and performance.

Highlights:

  • Handmade in France by Vigier – boutique quality
  • 90/10 carbon neck system – rock-solid stability
  • Active electronics – versatile, dynamic tone
  • Comfortable, ergonomic body – balanced and lightweight
  • Professional-grade craftsmanship – stage and studio ready

A rare instrument that combines precision engineering, unique design, and stunning tone — built for players who expect the very best.

item.title: Fender Player Jazz Bass 2020 — $823.82
item.description:
$823.82 · Very Good · Berta’s Bass Boutique

A true workhorse with soul — this 2020 Fender Player Series Jazz Bass has seen some action and earned its scars, but it plays fantastically. The neck feels smooth and fast, the tone is classic Fender — punchy, articulate, and endlessly versatile.

It’s been upgraded with Gotoh Res-O-Lite tuners, a premium lightweight set that improves balance and tuning stability while reducing headstock weight. The result: a bass that feels perfectly dialed in for real players.

Highlights:

  • 2020 Fender Player Series, made in Mexico
  • Gotoh Res-O-Lite tuners – lighter, better-balanced, rock-solid tuning
  • Classic Jazz Bass tone – bright, defined, and versatile
  • Comfortable modern neck with smooth feel
  • Honest playwear & minor scars – full of character, plays beautifully

If you want a Jazz Bass that feels alive, sounds killer, and plays like it’s been your mainstay for years — this one delivers.

item.title: Fender Aerodyne Special Jazz Bass Chocolate Burst MIJ – Very Good Condition — $1,119.83
item.description:
$1,119.83 · Very Good · Fair Deal Music

A superb example of the Fender Aerodyne Special Jazz Bass, finished in the stunning Chocolate Burst. Crafted in Japan, the Aerodyne Special series combines Fender's legendary Jazz Bass design with sleek modern styling, premium hardware and exceptional craftsmanship. With its carved bound body, matching painted headstock and lightweight construction, the Aerodyne Special offers a contemporary take on one of the world's most iconic bass guitars while retaining the unmistakable punch and articulation that Jazz Basses are renowned for.

Featuring a basswood body, Modern "C" maple neck, 12" radius rosewood fingerboard, a pair of newly designed Aerodyne Special Jazz Bass single-coil pickups and a premium Babicz Z-Series FCH-4 bridge, this bass delivers exceptional sustain, outstanding tuning stability and a versatile passive Jazz Bass voice suitable for virtually every musical style.

Condition – Very Good Used Condition

This bass has been professionally inspected and tested by our guitar technicians and is in Very Good overall condition.

  • Very good cosmetic condition

  • Light signs of previous ownership

  • Fully tested and playing beautifully

  • Comfortable, fast-playing neck

  • Electronics operating perfectly

  • Hardware functioning correctly

  • Structurally excellent and ready to perform

Please study the photographs carefully as they form part of the description and accurately represent the bass's condition.

Why Players Choose the Aerodyne Special Jazz Bass

The Aerodyne Special series blends classic Fender tone with modern performance enhancements.

Highlights include:

  • Made in Japan

  • Chocolate Burst finish

  • Matching painted headstock

  • Lightweight basswood body with carved bound top

  • Modern "C" maple neck

  • Rosewood fingerboard

  • 12" fingerboard radius

  • 20 Medium Jumbo frets

  • Aerodyne Special Jazz Bass single-coil pickups

  • Babicz Z-Series FCH-4 high-mass bridge

  • Chrome hardware

  • Deluxe Fender gig bag included

Tone & Performance

The Aerodyne Special Jazz Bass delivers everything players expect from a premium modern Jazz Bass.

Expect:

  • Punchy, articulate lows

  • Tight, defined midrange

  • Crisp slap tones

  • Smooth fingerstyle response

  • Excellent sustain

  • Superb note clarity

  • Outstanding tuning stability

  • Fast, comfortable playability

The combination of the high-mass Babicz bridge and newly voiced Aerodyne pickups produces a balanced, articulate sound with impressive sustain, while the lightweight body makes this bass exceptionally comfortable during long rehearsals and performances.

Perfect for:

  • Funk

  • Rock

  • Pop

  • Blues

  • Soul

  • Jazz

  • Session Work

  • Studio Recording

  • Live Performance

Specifications

  • Brand: Fender

  • Model: Aerodyne Special Jazz Bass

  • Finish: Chocolate Burst

  • Country of Manufacture: Japan

  • Body: Basswood

  • Neck: Maple

  • Neck Profile: Modern "C"

  • Fingerboard: Rosewood

  • Fingerboard Radius: 12"

  • Scale Length: 34"

  • Frets: 20 Medium Jumbo

  • Pickups: 2 × Aerodyne Special Jazz Bass Single-Coils

  • Controls: Volume, Volume, Master Tone

  • Bridge: Babicz Z-Series FCH-4

  • Hardware: Chrome

  • Matching Headstock: Yes

Included

  • Fender Aerodyne Special Jazz Bass

Why Buy This One?

The Fender Aerodyne Special Jazz Bass offers the perfect blend of Japanese craftsmanship, modern engineering and classic Fender tone. Its lightweight construction, premium Babicz bridge and sleek contemporary styling set it apart from a traditional Jazz Bass, while still delivering the versatility and unmistakable sound that have made the Jazz Bass a studio and stage favourite for decades. The Chocolate Burst finish is one of the most striking in the Aerodyne range, making this an excellent choice for both working musicians and collectors.

This example has been professionally inspected, is in Very Good condition.

Professionally packed for safe shipping.

Fair Deal Music – Family-run since 1987, Birmingham's largest independent music store with over 6,000 Excellent Trustpilot reviews.

Reverb Keywords

Fender Aerodyne Special Jazz Bass, Fender Aerodyne Bass, MIJ Jazz Bass, Made in Japan Fender Bass, Chocolate Burst Jazz Bass, Aerodyne Special, Babicz Bridge Bass, Fender Jazz Bass Japan, Lightweight Jazz Bass, Fender Aerodyne Chocolate Burst

item.title: Fender Player Precision Bass with Maple Fretboard 2018 - 2024 - Tidepool — $425
item.description:
$425 · Good · Donovan's Shop

Good condition P-Bass; plays amazing but has a properly big chunk missing out of the paint on the neck joint. Pricing to reflect this. Comes set up with Geezer Butler EMG pickups and a high mass bridge.

item.title: Fender American Deluxe Jazz Bass V-5 string 2011 - Natural — $2,850
item.description:
$2,850 · Excellent · Brian's Gear Bazaar

Key Features Identified

  • ﻿﻿Body & Finish: Premium ash or alder body with a classic natural gloss urethane finish.
  • ﻿﻿Pickups: Factory-equipped with Fender N3
    Noiseless Jazz Bass pickups, engineered to deliver signature punch and midrange growl without single-coil hum. ®
  • ﻿﻿Electronics: Features a flexible active/passive preamp control layout, complete with the original transparent factory protective overlay illustrating the knob functions (Volume, Pan/Blend, Treble/Bass, and Midrange).
  • ﻿﻿Hardware: High Mass Vintage (HMV) bridge supporting top-load or string-through-body configurations.
  • This American made premium Fender Jazz Bass is in extraordinary condition. It belonged to a friend of mine who took extreme care with it and hardly got to play it before his untimely passing.
  • This bass stayed in a smoke free home and was kept under excellent conditions since purchased new.
  • It’s now time for a new home.
  • Everything comes as a package showing all the items in the photos, including a premium leather suede ‘locking’ strap and and extra set of new/sealed string.
  • Includes the original Fender formed -interior hard case. This is also a flight case with a TSA lock. Very solid.
  • The bass alone was originally well over $3000.

item.title: Fender Limited Edition Player Precision Bass - MN Ocean Turquoise — $1,073.36
item.description:
$1,073.36 · Excellent · BMB Strumenti Musicali

Item has never been used and still has the protective film attached


Body: Alder

Finish: Glossy polyester

Neck: Maple

Profile: Modern “C”

Finish: Satin urethane

Scale length: 34" (864 mm)

Fingerboard: Maple

Radius: 9.5"

Frets: 20 Medium Jumbo

Nut: Synthetic Bone

Width: 1.625" (41.3mm)

Inlays: Black dots

Truss Rod: Standard

Truss Rod Nut: 3/16" hex

Pickups: Alnico 5 Split single-coil Precision Bass

Controls: Volume, Tone

Bridge: Adjustable 4-saddle

Hardware: Nickel / Chrome

Tuners: Standard Open-Gear

Pickguard: 4-ply tortoiseshell

Knobs: Flat-Top knurled

Plate: 4-bolt with “F” logo

Finish: Ocean Turquoise

item.title: Ernie Ball Stingray 5 HH 2023 - Laguna Green — $2,500
item.description:
$2,500 · Excellent · The Bassment

For sale an Ernie Ball Music Man Special Stingray 5 HH with mono case in a Laguna Green. Bass is in new like condition plays and sounds great and comes with a Mono case. Bass has a rosewood neck,18v preamp, roasted maple neck and built to play all genres of music.If you have any questions feel free to message me.

item.title: Sire Marcus Miller Jazz Bass V7 Swamp Ash 5-String 1 Gen - Bianco — $835.76
item.description:
$835.76 · Excellent · Outlet di strumenti di Giacomo

Vendo Sire Marcus Miller Jazz Bass V7 Swamp Ash 5-String 1st Generation pari al nuovo con ancora le plastiche sui pickups tenuto sempre in casa. Hard case non è compreso nel prezzo

item.title: Harley Benton Beatbass VS Vintage Series 2023 Vintage Sunburst — $214.91
item.description:
$214.91 · Excellent · meltin pop shop

Ottimo basso semiacustico, in ottime condizioni, copia del famoso Hofner

item.title: Ibanez SR300EL-IPT - Bass Guitars - Excellent — $305.52
item.description:
$305.52 · Excellent · Audio Trader

Ibanez SR300EL-IPT - Bass Guitars - Excellent Why This One
  • Excellent condition — light signs of use, no obvious issues
  • Fully tested — all applicable functions verified working
  • Left-handed SR bass with dual PowerSpan humbuckers and 3-band active EQ.
  • A versatile left-handed bass at a strong saving versus buying new.
Condition: Excellent

This Ibanez SR300EL-IPT is an excellent-condition bass guitar. It has passed our 9-point functional test, with 1 item(s) not applicable to this unit. Please review all photos carefully, as they provide an accurate representation of the cosmetic condition of the product.

What's Included
  • Ibanez SR300EL-IPT
  • No additional accessories included
About This Model

The Ibanez SR300EL-IPT is a left-handed 4-string electric bass finished in Iron Pewter, built around a mahogany or nyatoh body depending on production year. Its slim SR4 neck — a 5-piece maple/walnut or maple/rosewood construction — runs a 34" scale with a jatoba or rosewood fingerboard carrying 24 medium frets, making it comfortable for extended playing. The dual Ibanez PowerSpan Dual Coil passive pickups in an HH configuration are paired with Ibanez Custom Electronics 3-band EQ and a 3-way Power Tap switch, giving players a wide tonal palette from clean and punchy to thick and aggressive. An Accu-cast B120 fixed bridge with 19mm string spacing and cosmo black hardware complete the build.

A great opportunity to own a Ibanez SR300EL-IPT at this price point.

item.title: Fender Highway 1 Precision Bass 2003 - Sunburst Inc Hiscox Hard Case — $1,100.21
item.description:
$1,100.21 · Very Good · Cookes Band Instruments

Pre Loved Fender Highway 1 Precision Bass Modified Sunburst Inc Hiscox Case

Made in the USA in 2003 and in a very good used condition - The Satin Sunburst finish does has lots of blemishes in places - light scuffs and dinks etc, but nothing too big. The finish has also reacted in several spots on the body - again, nothing too major, but it is noticeable.

The bass does come with a set of strap locks and a fitted Hiscox Hard Case.

By Fender:

The Highway One™ Precision Bass® guitar takes the time-honored model down new roads with modern features and vintage styling. Features include an alder body, modern C-shaped maple neck with 20-fret rosewood fingerboard and '70s headstock decal, Badass® II bridge with grooved saddles, three-ply parchment pickguard and satin nitrocellulose lacquer finish that will wear more easily to reflect the journey you take together.

item.title: D. Lakin (of Lakland Fame) Jazz Bass 2020s - Olympic White — $2,295
item.description:
$2,295 · Excellent · Kebo's Bass Works

When considering any purchase, know exactly who you are dealing with. Please read our ‘about us’ page.

D. Lakin is the new brand from Dan who was the father of Lakland. This is a very nice traditional Jazz Bass, American Made, plays and sounds great, shows just mild wear, 9.3 lbs and has a nice gigbag. This is an awesome bass with a wide, traditional tonal signature. Its a good one!

We're pros at KBW. We stand behind every item we sell. Nothing is ever a final sale especially since you worked hard for your money. We buy so much misdescribed junk its not even funny and we promise a peace of mind experience. Thank you for your consideration.

item.title: G&L L2000 1995 Circa - Trans Blue over Ash — $1,879
item.description:
$1,879 · Very Good · Kebo's Bass Works

When considering any purchase, know exactly who you are dealing with. Please read our ‘about us’ page.

WOW, where to start?!?!? First question we get asked is, 'Hows the neck'? The neck on this one is good! Truss rod works in both directions. Action is super low, plays even and clear. The tone is that ballsy, throaty early G&L but can easily be dialed back to civility. Typical, expected G&L tone. EVERYTHING works on the electronics. This was someones gig monster and shows all over wear. This is an ASH bodied bass and gets that naturally open, mildly compressed tone which is why these are sought after. Like I said, its ash bodied and a bit heavy but if you want that tone..... Comes with a nice orig hard case. This bass kills and so can you.

We're pros at KBW. We stand behind every item we sell. Nothing is ever a final sale especially since you worked hard for your money. We buy so much misdescribed junk its not even funny and we promise a peace of mind experience. Thank you for your consideration.

item.title: 2025 Rickenbacker 4003s Jetglo — $1,850
item.description:
$1,850 · Excellent · Rodolfo's Shop

***Mint***Condition Rickenbacker 4003s in beautiful Jetglo.


Got this bass about 3 months ago Brand New from Wildwood Guitars. I don’t play it and it’s been sitting in its case I just prefer my PBass and Jazz.

Bass has been professionally set-up with Ernie Ball Cobalt Flatwounds.


Serial number: 2536714

item.title: Bluesman Vintage El Dorado Jazz Bass 2020s - Sherwood Green Light Relic — $2,479
item.description:
$2,479 · Excellent · Kebo's Bass Works

When considering any purchase, know exactly who you are dealing with. Please read our ‘about us’ page.

We know Bluesman products because we are one of the largest BMV dealers on the planet - we also are booth staff at some of the trade shows and with that said, I'll tell ya, this bass kills and so can you. Roasted maple neck, light factory relic on exact sherwood green, perfect set up, 9 pounds even. Factory perfect. Comes with a gigbag.

We're pros at KBW. We stand behind every item we sell. Nothing is ever a final sale especially since you worked hard for your money. We buy so much misdescribed junk its not even funny and we promise a peace of mind experience. Thank you for your consideration.

item.title: Gibson LPB3 Les Paul Bass 2005 - Honeyburst — $2,479
item.description:
$2,479 · Very Good · Kebo's Bass Works

When considering any purchase, know exactly who you are dealing with. Please read our ‘about us’ page.

Oh do we like this one! Plays great, sounds great, looks great. Set up to perfection, has a great tonal signature, looks great. Shows minor wear and simple patina. The finish has a slightly faded finish from age, not exposure. Looks totally awesome, built 315th day of 2005. Has the orig hard case. This has the generation 2 small headstock so she balances perfect.

We're pros at KBW. We stand behind every item we sell. Nothing is ever a final sale especially since you worked hard for your money. We buy so much misdescribed junk its not even funny and we promise a peace of mind experience. Thank you for your consideration.

item.title: Ibanez SRMS625EX-BKF Iron Label Multi-Scale Soundgear 2021 - Present - Black Flat — $770.85
item.description:
$770.85 · Excellent · Jonny 's Gear Locker

  • SRMS5 Multi Scale 5pc Maple/Walnut neck (35.5 to 34)
  • Okoume body
  • Ebonol fretboard
  • 24 Medium frets
  • MR5 monorail bridge
  • 16.5mm string spacing
  • Bartolini® BH2 neck pickup (Passive)
  • Bartolini® BH2 bridge pickup (Passive)
  • Ibanez Custom Electronics 3-band EQ w/ EQ bypass switch (passive tone control on treble pot) & 3-way Mid frequency switch

    Never been gigged, has stayed in my home studio. It sounds like a monster with massive bite and low end.

item.title: Fender USA Jazz Bass - '62 Stack Knob Reissue, AVRI 2007 - Olympic White — $1,995
item.description:
$1,995 · Very Good · Kebo's Bass Works

When considering any purchase, know exactly who you are dealing with. Please read our ‘about us’ page.

Yes, this is a good one! Shes all there except for the thumb rest. Has the goodies and the orig hard tweed case. GREAT NECK on this one with low action, just set up and plays great. June 25 2007 build date, 8.6 lbs which is a really good weight. Sounds awesome, plays awesome, looks awesome. Shows mild wear but nothing to tell momma about. This is a good one and we LOVE the color on this one!

We're pros at KBW. We stand behind every item we sell. Nothing is ever a final sale especially since you worked hard for your money. We buy so much misdescribed junk its not even funny and we promise a peace of mind experience. Thank you for your consideration.

item.title: ESP LTD PHOENIX-1004 Bass in Tobacco Sunburst Satin B-Stock — $1,399
item.description:
$1,399 · B-Stock · Studio Gears

ESP LTD PHOENIX-1004 Bass in Tobacco Sunburst Satin B-Stock

The PHOENIX-1004 delivers a comfortable, resonant playing experience with its neck-thru construction and warm mahogany body that sustains effortlessly across the 34" scale. The thin U-shaped neck contour and Macassar ebony fingerboard with 15.75-inch radius support both rapid fingerwork and complex grooves without fatigue. This is a meticulously finished instrument that balances classic aesthetics with modern electronics and professional-grade hardware.

Construction & Build Quality

Neck-thru-body construction with a 5-piece mahogany/walnut neck ensures superior sustain and seamless upper-fret access, while the mahogany body wings deliver warm, resonant tone with rich harmonic complexity. The Macassar ebony fingerboard with 400mm radius provides a smooth, durable playing surface that maintains its feel through years of use.

Tone & Electronics

Dual Fishman Fluence SB-1 pickups deliver exceptional clarity and broad tonal range, with switchable single-coil mode via pull tone function for expanded sonic versatility. Separate neck and bridge volume controls paired with a master tone knob (push/pull function) enable detailed sound shaping across any musical style.

Key Features
  • Neck-thru-body construction with 5-piece mahogany/walnut neck and mahogany body wings
  • 34" scale length with thin U-shaped neck contour for ergonomic playability
  • Macassar ebony fingerboard with 15.75-inch radius and 21 extra-jumbo stainless steel frets
  • 1.575-inch nut width providing balanced string spacing
  • Dual Fishman Fluence SB-1 pickups with single-coil mode switching via pull tone function
  • Separate neck and bridge volume controls with master tone knob (push/pull function)
  • Gotoh 201B-4 bridge and LTD vintage tuners with reverse headstock
  • Tobacco Sunburst Satin finish with black hardware
  • Strung with D'Addario XL165 strings

The PHOENIX-1004 combines professional-grade components, refined ergonomics, and flexible electronics into an instrument built for studio work, live performance, and serious practice.

This specific B-Stock unit features minor cosmetic imperfections consistent with warehouse handling and display. These marks are purely superficial and have absolutely zero impact on the playability, tone, or structural integrity of the bass. Acquire this premium ESP LTD instrument at a significant B-Stock discount while maintaining complete confidence through the full manufacturer warranty.

item.title: G&L ASAT Bass 2010 - Blonde — $1,895
item.description:
$1,895 · Excellent · Kebo's Bass Works

When considering any purchase, know exactly who you are dealing with. Please read our ‘about us’ page.

We like this one and you will too! She's super clean, just showing mild player wear with no chipping, checking or oops damage. Just mild, typical wear and maybe a simple mark. 1.5 inch nut (Jazz Width), plays great, frets show little to no wear, perfect set up, has the cert. Comes with a nice case, a Fender TSA hard shell that is brand new. She's a clean bean.

We're pros at KBW. We stand behind every item we sell. Nothing is ever a final sale especially since you worked hard for your money. We buy so much misdescribed junk its not even funny and we promise a peace of mind experience. Thank you for your consideration.

item.title: TWO Clef Gut Silver Wound Upright Bass Strings - E and A ONLY — $300
item.description:
$300 · Excellent · Gear Centre

Up for sale are two brand new E and A Clef pure gut silver wound upright bass strings. Clef Gut Jazz Double Bass Strings are available in full sets only, so this is your chance to grab up two single upright bass strings. These two strings are brand new. I love these Clef gut strings but only use the two plain gut that come In the set. They were just purchased from Upton Bass.

Clef Gut Jazz Double Bass Strings are a high-quality, European-made option that delivers a classic tone and exceptional stability, ensuring they are sure to last!

Moreover, while they are similar to Clef Gut Upright Bass Strings, there are some key differences. Specifically, the A and E strings are silver wound, which enhances their tonal quality.

These double bass strings are handmade by European craftsman using only mutton serosa (sheep intestine). Mutton gives a lower tension, softer feel, and warm rich tones within the string. It is far too delicate to process by machine, and even the twisting of the strands into a string is done by hand—it’s the only way to properly judge the tension of the string.

item.description:

item.title: 4 String Fretless Short Scale Bolt On Bass Busuyi Guitar 2024. — $220
item.description:
$220 · Mint · Asi's Gear Depot

  • Bolt On Neck
  • Fretless Bass Guitar
  • Maplewood fretboard
  • 4 String Short Scale Bass

item.title: 4 String Short Scale Neck Through Bass/6 String Tremolo Busuyi Double Side, Headless Guitar — $450
item.description:
$450 · Mint · Asi's Gear Depot

  • Tremolo Bridge + Tremolo lock
  • Headless Bass & Guitar model
  • Double sides, dual jack
  • Maplewood fretboard
  • Short Scale bass, fun to play
  • Buy here, its $1,128.00 on eBay
  • Join style: set neck( neck through body)
  • body: basswood wood
  • neck: maple wood
  • fingerboard radium: 13 inch
  • fingerboard: maple neck
  • truss rod: double adjust
  • pickups: passive pickups.
  • control : 1V. 1T.1-3 way toggle one jack output.(guitar side)
  • . 1V.2T. one jack out put.(bass side)
  • bridge: headless bridge( guitar and bass)
  • scale length 648mm for guitar.
  • 864mm for bass.
  • Custom made Hard Case
